initial_draft:
Player BLUE is starting with 0 dollars. Player RED is offering 40 dollars, which is a significant portion of their 100 dollars. Since this is a one-time trade and there are no future games, accepting this offer would provide Player BLUE with a substantial gain without any risk. Rejecting could lead to losing the opportunity to gain any resources.

```
<my name> BLUE </my name>
<MOVE> 1/4 </MOVE>
<my resources> Dollars: 0 </my resources>
<reason> Accepting the offer gives me 40 dollars, which is a good deal since I start with nothing. Rejecting would mean I get nothing, so accepting is the best choice. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Thanks for the generous offer! I accept. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```
